message:
chore(artifacts): refresh verification evidence across all sections

Update verification_evidence.json, verification_summary.md, and
check_report.json files from concurrent agent re-runs covering
sections 10.4, 10.5, 10.6, 10.9, 10.12, 10.13, 10.14, 10.15, 10.16,
13, 15, 16, and bootstrap. Reflects latest test pass/fail status,
updated timing data, and doctor contract validation results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
